activity_1_b.text:
Listen and repeat.
සවන් දී වචන නැවත කියන්න.
கேட்டு மீண்டும் சொல்லுங்கள்.

ஒரே நேரத்தில் வாசியுங்கள்.

content.sentence_text: The system was provisioni'ng' user accounts automatically to ensure secure access to the network.
Bandwidth throttli'ng' was implemented to regulate network traffic during peak usage periods.
A si'ng'le-core processor was replaced with a multi-core unit to improve overall system performance.
The fi'ng'erprint scanner was configured to strengthen biometric authentication and restrict unauthorised access.

example.text:
Listen to the model dialogues.
ආදර්ශ සංවාදවලට සවන් දෙන්න.
மாதிரி உரையாடல்களை கேளுங்கள்.

activity_2_a.text:
Match the words with the pictures.
පින්තූර සමඟ වචන ගලපන්න.
சொற்களைப் படங்களுடன் பொருத்துங்கள்.

activity_2_c.text:
Listen and repeat.
සවන් දී වාක්‍ය නැවත කියන්න.
கேட்டு மீண்டும் சொல்லுங்கள்.

ஒரே நேரத்தில் வாசியுங்கள்.

activity_2_e.text:
Read the answer and use the pause to ask the correct question. Then compare your response with the model question.
 පිළිතුර කියවා නිවැරදි ප්‍රශ්නය ඇසීමට විරාමය භාවිතා කරන්න. ඉන්පසු ඔබේ පිළිතුර ආදර්ශ පිළිතුර සමඟ සසඳන්න.
 பதிலைக் கவனமாக வாசித்து, இடைவெளியில் சரியான கேள்வியை கேளுங்கள். பின்னர் உங்கள் கேள்வியை மாதிரி கேள்வியுடன் ஒப்பிடவும்.

example_dialogues.text_a: Where should I leave the safety checklist?
example_dialogues.text_b: Leave it on the supervisor’s desk, next to the inspection file.

example_dialogues.text_a: Is there a calibrated measuring device anywhere in the workshop?
example_dialogues.text_b: No, there isn’t. In fact, there aren’t any calibrated measuring devices in the workshop at the moment.

example_dialogues.text_a: Do you complete maintenance reports on Monday mornings?
example_dialogues.text_b: No, I don’t. But I complete maintenance reports on Monday evenings. I have more time to focus on documentation in the evenings than in the mornings.

dialogues.text_a: Does she usually inspect the equipment on Friday afternoons?
dialogues.text_b: No, she rarely inspects the equipment on Friday afternoons. She usually inspects it on Tuesday mornings.

dialogues.text_a: Why are you testing the backup system manually?
dialogues.text_b: I am testing it manually because the automated system is offline. I always test it manually when the automated system is unavailable.

dialogues.text_a: Can he assist us with the final inspection tomorrow afternoon?
dialogues.text_b: I’m afraid he can’t. He has to attend a compliance meeting tomorrow afternoon, and no replacement has been assigned.

dialogues.text_a: What do you usually do during the weekend?
dialogues.text_b: I like to review new technical manuals. I normally analyse one manual every Saturday, but this weekend I am going to review three updated manuals.

dialogues.text_a: Sir, may I leave thirty minutes earlier today? I have severe back pain.
dialogues.text_c: I strained it while lifting a freezer.

dialogues.text_a: Can you operate the digital monitoring system independently?
dialogues.text_b: Yes, I can. I regularly operate the digital monitoring system in my current role. In fact, this is my primary responsibility on Wednesdays.

activity_a.text:
Choose the correct answer.
 නිවැරදි පිළිතුර තෝරන්න.
 சரியான பதிலைத் தேர்ந்தெடுக்கவும்.

activity_b.text:
Listen and repeat.
සවන් දී වාක්‍ය නැවත කියන්න.
கேட்டு மீண்டும் சொல்லுங்கள்.

content.sentence: The technician _____ a vulnerability in the system yesterday afternoon.
The router is installed _____ the firewall and the main switch in the rack.
She usually _____ the network settings, but she _____ them right now.
There _____ always a notification alert on the dashboard during updates.
There _____ three backup drives connected to the storage server.
The system administrator _____ checks security logs before shutting down.
You _____ troubleshoot connectivity issues using this diagnostic tool.
I _____ update the antivirus software before accessing the database.
We _____ deploy the new application tomorrow.
_____ the programmers _____ all the reported bugs yesterday?
The engineer _____ the server performance now to prevent overload.
_____ any open ports on the network firewall?
_____ he _____ the maintenance report every evening?
He _____ his login credentials before accessing the secure system every day.

activity_b.text: The server is fully operational today.
The technician found a vulnerability in the system yesterday afternoon.
The router is installed between the firewall and the main switch in the rack.
She usually configures the network settings, but she is updating them right now.
There is always a notification alert on the dashboard during updates.
There are three backup drives connected to the storage server.
The system administrator usually checks security logs before shutting down.
You can troubleshoot connectivity issues using this diagnostic tool.
I have to update the antivirus software before accessing the database.
We are going to deploy the new application tomorrow.
Did the programmers fix all the reported bugs yesterday?
The engineer is monitoring the server performance now to prevent overload.
Are there any open ports on the network firewall?
Does he write the maintenance report every evening?
He enters his login credentials before accessing the secure system every day.

activity_a.text:
Listen to the audio which will be played twice and click on the correct answer. It is very important that you read the questions before you listen to the recording.
ඔබට සෑම පටිගත කිරීමක්ම දෙවරක් ඇසෙනු ඇත. නිවැරදි පිළිතුර ක්ලික් කරන්න. රෙකෝඩින් එක අහන්නට පෙර ප්‍රශ්නය කියවීම ඉතාමත් වැදගත්ය.
ஒவ்வொரு ஒலிப்பதிவையும் நீங்கள் இருமுறை கேட்கலாம். கேட்ட எண்களை குறித்து எழுதுங்கள். பதிவைக் கேட்பதற்கு முன் கேள்விகளைப் படிப்பது மிகவும் முக்கியம்.

activity_b.text:
Listen.
கேளுங்கள்.
සවන් දෙන්න.

activity_c.text:
Listen and repeat.
සවන් දී වාක්‍ය නැවත කියන්න.
கேட்டு மீண்டும் சொல்லுங்கள்.

Questions.question: What does Farah’s research about the company suggest?
Questions.answer: She prepares in advance and shows genuine interest.
options: She is mainly interested in salary and benefits.
She prepares in advance and shows genuine interest.
She expects detailed supervision at all times.

Questions.question: Why does Farah find ICT work satisfying?
Questions.answer: She enjoys solving varied technical challenges.
options: She prefers doing repetitive maintenance tasks.
She enjoys solving varied technical challenges.

Questions.question: What can be inferred about Farah’s approach to cybersecurity?
Questions.answer: She treats cybersecurity as part of everyday work.
options: She follows security rules only when monitored.
She depends entirely on automated systems.
She treats cybersecurity as part of everyday work.

Questions.question: How does Farah respond to technological changes?
Questions.answer: She accepts the need for continuous learning.
options: She avoids unfamiliar systems and software.
She accepts the need for continuous learning.
She believes older systems are always better.

Questions.question: What does Farah’s attitude toward feedback show?
Questions.answer: She uses feedback to improve and collaborate better.
options: She uses feedback to improve and collaborate better.

activity_b.text: It is satisfying to see how hardware and software components work together efficiently.
Each task is different, whether it involves configuring networks, debugging applications, or maintaining databases.
I also appreciate teamwork in IT projects because collaboration often produces more effective solutions.
I am confident in assembling desktop units, installing operating systems, configuring basic networks, and troubleshooting common hardware issues.
I have also assisted with updating software, scanning for malware, backing up data, and documenting technical procedures.
I always follow standard security protocols.
I use strong passwords, update antivirus software regularly, and ensure data backups are completed properly.
I also handle sensitive information responsibly and report unusual system activity immediately.
Technology changes rapidly, so I understand the importance of continuous learning.
I can adapt to new software tools and follow updated standard operating procedures.
I often watch tutorials and practise new configurations to strengthen my skills.
I value guidance from senior technicians and communicate openly with team members.

instrction_a.text:
Watch this video to help you better understand today’s lesson.
අද පාඩම හොඳින් අවබෝධ කර ගැනීමට මෙම වීඩියෝව බලන්න.
இன்றைய பாடத்தை நன்றாக புரிந்துகொள்ள இந்த வீடியோவைப் பாருங்கள்.

instruction_b.text:
These steps will help you to learn English from this video.
මෙම වීඩියෝවෙන් ඉංග්‍රීසි ඉගෙන ගැනීමට මෙම පියවර ඔබට උපකාරී වනු ඇත.
இந்த வீடியோவிலிருந்து ஆங்கிலம் கற்க இந்த படிகள் உங்களுக்கு உதவும்.
steps:
Watch the video 2 times.

வீடியோவை இரண்டு முறைப் பாருங்கள்.

Learn new words using Google Translate.
Google පරිවර්තකය භාවිතයෙන් නව වචන ඉගෙන ගන්න.
கூகுள் ட்ரான்ஸ்லேட் பயன்படுத்தி புதிய சொற்களைக் கற்றுக்கொள்ளுங்கள்.
